metadata.name: prediction_market
metadata.description: Permissionless private prediction markets on Solana using MagicBlock / PER

instructions.name: claim_settled_private_position
docs: Claim final settled payout from the Solana L1 vault.
This happens after ER/PER settlement writes claimable_amount into

instructions.name: commit_and_undelegate
docs: Commit and undelegate market shell back to Solana L1.
Usually called after market resolution / settlement.

instructions.name: commit_market
docs: Commit and undelegate market shell back to Solana L1.
Usually called after market resolution / settlement.

instructions.name: commit_position
docs: Commit and undelegate trader position shell back to Solana L1.
Usually called after settle_private_position_er has written final
claimable_amount into the public position shell.

instructions.name: commit_position_and_undelegate
docs: Commit and undelegate trader position shell back to Solana L1.
Usually called after settle_private_position_er has written final
claimable_amount into the public position shell.

instructions.name: create_market_permission
docs: Delegate market shell into MagicBlock / PER.

instructions.name: create_position_permission
docs: Create a MagicBlock permission PDA for a trader position shell.
This mirrors the working payroll flow, where the delegated public PDA
first gets a permission account before the permission itself is delegated.

instructions.name: create_private_market
docs: Create a permissionless private prediction market.
It does NOT mint public YES/NO SPL tokens.

accounts.name: vault
docs: This vault holds real collateral on Solana L1.

instructions.name: delegate_market_into_tee
docs: Delegate market shell into MagicBlock / PER.

accounts.name: market
docs: We deserialize and validate this manually because MagicBlock's
`#[account(mut, del)]` delegation marker works on AccountInfo.

instructions.name: delegate_position_into_tee
docs: Delegate trader position shell into MagicBlock / PER.

accounts.name: position
docs: We deserialize and validate this manually because MagicBlock's

instructions.name: deposit_collateral
docs: Deposit collateral into the market L1 vault.
This does not reveal YES/NO direction because no trade happens here.

accounts.name: admin
docs: This signer pays for the config account and becomes protocol admin.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint used by the protocol.

instructions.name: initialize_private_market_state
docs: Initialize ER/PER-only private market state and creator private position.
This converts creator's initial L1 liquidity into balanced virtual

accounts.name: market
docs: This sponsors/anchors the ER private market state.

accounts.name: creator_position
docs: This delegated PDA is the single sponsor for both ER-only accounts
This is a delegated sponsor shell. We deserialize and validate it
manually to avoid Anchor write-back on exit.

accounts.name: market_state
docs: Created and serialized manually inside MagicBlock / PER.

accounts.name: private_position
docs: Created and serialized manually inside MagicBlock / PER.

instructions.name: initialize_private_position_state
docs: Initialize ER/PER-only private position state for a normal trader.
The trader's deposited L1 collateral becomes private available collateral.

accounts.name: position
docs: This is a delegated sponsor shell. We deserialize and validate it
manually to avoid Anchor write-back on exit.

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Open a public position shell for a trader.
The actual live position will later be initialized inside MagicBlock / PER.

instructions.name: place_private_prediction
docs: Place a private prediction inside MagicBlock / PER.
Traders allocate idle collateral to either the YES or NO side.
No public YES/NO SPL tokens are minted during this operation.

instructions.name: resolve_private_market_er
docs: Resolve private market inside MagicBlock / PER.

instructions.name: settle_private_position_er
docs: Settle a private position after market resolution.
Then writes claimable_amount into the public TraderPosition shell.

accounts.name: trader
docs: Trader or authorized keeper settling this position.
Later you can allow keeper/admin/oracle to settle many positions.

instructions.name: withdraw_collateral
docs: Withdraw idle L1 collateral before PER activation.
Once the position is delegated/activated in PER, withdrawals should go

errors.name: PrivateMarketNotEnded
errors.msg: Private market has not ended yet

errors.name: PrivateMarketStateNotInitialized
errors.msg: Private market state is not initialized

errors.name: PrivatePositionStateNotInitialized
errors.msg: Private position state is not initialized

errors.name: PrivatePositionTraderMismatch
errors.msg: Private position belongs to a different trader

errors.name: PrivatePositionMarketMismatch
errors.msg: Private position belongs to a different market

types.name: CollateralDeposited
docs: Event emitted when collateral is deposited into a market vault.

types.name: CollateralWithdrawn
docs: Event emitted when idle L1 collateral is withdrawn before PER activation.

types.name: Config
docs: This is a singleton PDA that controls protocol-wide settings:

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin can pause/unpause the protocol and update high-level settings

fields.name: oracle
docs: This account is allowed to resolve markets after the market end time.
In production, this should ideally become:

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: - any SPL Token / Token-2022 compatible collateral mint

fields.name: min_liquidity
docs: Minimum collateral required to create a market.

fields.name: market_count
docs: Used to derive deterministic market PDA:

fields.name: paused
docs: If true, market creation, deposits, and trading should stop.

fields.name: tee_validator
docs: MagicBlock / Private Ephemeral Rollup validator identity.
This is the validator / TEE identity used for delegation.
On devnet, this can be the MagicBlock devnet validator identity.

types.name: Market
docs: This account is NOT the live trading state.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when market was created.

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint used by this market.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault should be an ATA:

fields.name: total_deposited
docs: Total collateral deposited into this market's vault.
This is public aggregate accounting only.
Individual private positions live in MagicBlock / PER state.

fields.name: final_reserves
docs: This is filled/updated when the private state is settled/committed.

fields.name: total_claimable_settled
docs: Sum of all settled claimable amounts.

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Sum of collateral already claimed by users.

fields.name: outcome
docs: Only meaningful after the market is resolved.

types.name: MarketCommittedAndUndelegated
docs: Event emitted when a market shell is committed and undelegated.

types.name: MarketDelegated
docs: Event emitted when a market shell is delegated into MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: MarketStatus
docs: Public lifecycle status of the market shell.

types.name: OracleUpdated
docs: Event emitted when oracle authority changes.

types.name: PositionCommittedAndUndelegated
docs: Event emitted when a position shell is committed and undelegated.

types.name: PositionDelegated
docs: Event emitted when a position shell is delegated into MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: PositionOpened
docs: Event emitted when a trader opens a position shell.

types.name: PrivateMarketCreated
docs: Event emitted when a new private prediction market is created.
This does NOT mint public YES/NO SPL tokens.
It only creates the public market shell and locks collateral into the vault.

types.name: PrivateMarketResolvedEr
docs: Event emitted when a private market is resolved inside MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: PrivateMarketStateInitialized
docs: Event emitted when private market state is initialized inside MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: PrivatePositionSettledEr
docs: Event emitted when a private position is settled inside MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: PrivatePositionStateInitialized
docs: Event emitted when private trader position state is initialized inside MagicBlock / PER.

types.name: PrivatePredictionPlaced
docs: Event emitted when a private prediction is placed.
This event intentionally does NOT reveal:
The actual position remains inside MagicBlock / PER private state.

types.name: ProtocolInitialized
docs: Event emitted when the protocol is initialized.

types.name: ProtocolPauseUpdated
docs: Event emitted when protocol pause status changes.

types.name: SettledPositionClaimed
docs: Event emitted when a settled private position is claimed from L1 vault.

types.name: TeeValidatorUpdated
docs: Event emitted when MagicBlock / PER validator identity changes.

types.name: TraderPosition
docs: This is NOT the live private trading position.
- whether the position has been delegated

fields.name: collateral_deposited
docs: Total collateral deposited into this market by this trader.
It does not reveal YES/NO direction.

fields.name: collateral_withdrawn
docs: Collateral withdrawn before the private ER state becomes active.
Once delegated / initialized in PER, live available collateral should
be tracked in PrivatePositionState, not here.

fields.name: claimable_amount
docs: Final claimable payout after ER/PER settlement.

fields.name: claimed_amount
docs: Amount already claimed from the market vault.

fields.name: delegated
docs: Whether this position shell has been delegated / activated for PER use.

fields.name: settled
docs: Whether final payout has been settled for this position.

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether the user has fully claimed the settled payout.
